'''Corlissi Ludar''' was a [[Sluissi]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Senator/Legends|senator]] who represented [[Sluis Van/Legends|Sluis Van]] and the [[Sluis sector/Legends|Sluis sector]] in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]], succeeding Senator [[Bor Gracus]].

==Biography==
During the outbreak of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], Corlissi Ludar left his seat and announced his withdrawal from the Senate since he found how corrupt the Republic was. He was one of the representatives from the [[Rimma Trade Route/Legends|Rimma Trade Route]] that left the Republic.

==Appearances==
